name: Gambling Hall Rules
description: Rules for blackjack and poker used in the gambling map

entries.name: Blackjack Rules
entries.content:
BLACKJACK RULES:
- Goal: Get as close to 21 without going over (bust).
- Card values: Numbers = face value. J/Q/K = 10. Ace = 1 or 11 (best for the player).
- Each player gets 2 cards. Dealer shows one card face up.
- Player options: HIT (take another card), STAND (keep current hand), DOUBLE DOWN (double bet, take one card).
- If your hand exceeds 21, you BUST and lose your bet.
- Dealer must hit until reaching 17 or higher.
- Blackjack (Ace + 10-value card on first 2 cards) pays 3:2.
- Best hand wins. Ties push (return bet).
entries.content_summary: Blackjack: Get close to 21. Hit/stand/double. Bust = lose. Dealer hits to 17. Blackjack pays 3:2.
entries.content_bullets:
- Goal: Closest to 21 without busting
- Hit/Stand/Double Down
- Dealer hits to 17+
- Blackjack pays 3:2

entries.name: Poker Rules
entries.content:
TEXAS HOLD'EM POKER RULES:
- Each player gets 2 hole cards (hidden).
- 5 community cards dealt in stages: Flop (3 cards), Turn (1 card), River (1 card).
- Betting rounds: Pre-flop, Flop, Turn, River.
- Player options: CHECK (pass), CALL (match bet), RAISE (increase bet), FOLD (give up).
- Best 5-card hand from your 2 hole cards + 5 community cards wins.
- Hand rankings (high to low): Royal Flush, Straight Flush, Four of a Kind, Full House, Flush, Straight, Three of a Kind, Two Pair, Pair, High Card.
- Blinds: Small blind and Big blind are forced bets to start action.
- All-in: Bet everything. Side pots created if needed.
entries.content_summary: Poker Hold'em: 2 hole cards + 5 community. Best 5-card hand wins. Bet/call/raise/fold. Hand rankings apply.
entries.content_bullets:
- 2 hole cards + 5 community
- Betting: Pre-flop/Flop/Turn/River
- Check/Call/Raise/Fold
- Hand rankings: Royal Flush down to High Card

entries.name: Table Etiquette
entries.content:
TABLE RULES:
- Minimum bet: $10. Maximum bet: $500 per round.
- No string bets — declare your full bet at once.
- Cards must stay visible on the table.
- The dealer's word is final.
- House takes a 5% cut of each pot.
- All players start with $1,000 in chips.

entries.name: Betting Commands
entries.content:
AVAILABLE GAME COMMANDS:
Players can use these tool calls:
- <call:money action="bet" player="YOUR_ID" amount="N"> — Place a bet
- <call:money action="fold" player="YOUR_ID"> — Fold your hand
- <call:money action="balance" player="YOUR_ID"> — Check your balance
- <call:cards action="deal" count="1" to="YOUR_ID"> — Request a card (hit)
- <call:cards action="show_hand" player="YOUR_ID"> — Look at your cards
- <call:cards action="show_table"> — See all visible cards

The USER (human player) has these additional commands:
- <call:cards action="set_game" game="blackjack"> — Switch to blackjack
- <call:cards action="set_game" game="poker"> — Switch to poker
- <call:cards action="shuffle"> — Shuffle the deck

LLM players MUST use tool calls to take game actions. Speaking in character does not count as taking an action.
